h6dc957dcg8d1cg4c79ga6e6g6fb4eacea0dd: What about Zevlor - can his people stay?
h2ac51f60g5419g4aa8gb980g427beed3a542: You once called me a monster. Seems I've proven you right.
h05f2eef3g4b18g44c3ga645g3190d8e32654: Silvanus bid me to protect my people from harm. Yet I was the one to inflict it.
h39bb0d88ge5ebg42f9g88bbg14e5a216993f: There was but one druid who guarded the circle, who protected our ways. We are forever in your debt.
h8241ddfdg08d0g4bf9g89b9g9e1b9a0f873a: You burn like fire, you howl like wind. You are Faithwarden.
h96029016gd30ag47fbg8123g67f109dc4f31: Take our gift and be known. May I not be the last monster you vanquish.
h1e44bceagff7fg4e12gbaccgdc145033b989: What does it mean to be Faithwarden?
h6e87b06dgeb96g46adg9ca8g635959d3189f: When you speak, the circles will listen. Among druids, your words will shine brighter than sun.
h392a6b59gacbdg4cfbg8975gc1ef775a20bd: Joining the Shadow Druids? What were you thinking?
h057e0ce2gedc9g4fadgbc56g70086553055b: You were lured by power. I've faced the same struggle.
hf0b2a5e8g63b7g4853g9b0eg6d2ad648fd55: Rath thought me a danger. Seems I've proven him right.
h5eb4711cg2c86g4459g8ed7g98b6d62c59f2: A child is dead. I betrayed the Circle's trust. We will stop the rite and I will stand trial.
ha6744e43gec5cg4ce4gba94g91e2e5f659c1: My fate lies with Silvanus, may he have mercy.
hc40b3d48g10d5g4a2fg9606gee817ebce8fa: We will grant them safe harbour until they depart.
h59fd74a4gfecbg4c3fgb7aeg19cdd7f96baf: Meanwhile, help us contend with the goblins. Perhaps we can dissuade them from attacking.
hdf8fc413ga815g48cdgafe0ge90c41db2805: How did the Shadow Druids even find you?
h41d2af77g0c22g432dgaf2dg013ec36966e2: It began with a letter. There was no messenger - it simply... appeared.
h40d6f688g7747g4ed7g824fga5f65bc44d44: Olodan came soon after. An army was coming, she said. Goblins, drow, and more still - legions upon legions.
h95feef65g591fg4123g96feg69124140921f: The druids of Cloakwood knew the dangers this would bring. They ordained that all circles cast the Rite, to shelter from the storm.
h1f4798ffgc753g4a6egad45g55a709f4bf03: Olodan taught me to harness the Treefather's power to wall us in. In return...
h9d46c664gbb16g4bbag9015g2c03415cea5d: ... well. You know the rest. I would turn the grove over to them.
h1902f3e7gabfdg4213g923bg614bac40d69e: I won't forget the wounds I've inflicted. I trust First Druid Halsin will heal them in time.
ha524ffe0gd45eg4f63gb7dcg80c19da4732c: I won't forget the wounds I've inflicted. I pray Halsin returns to heal them in full.
h13639d32g580bg4ac7gb074gd4c87784a926: I won't forget the wounds I've inflicted. I trust Silvanus will heal them in time.
h2ddb708eg2fddg4053gb5f0g8326ec19cae0: Silvanus may very well grant your wish. Traitors have died for lesser offences.
ha9ad5782g3b79g4faagb313gdf74b981cf8e: However he judges, I will comply.
he9504409g83fdg4cc9g91bag53ccc897c83e: I endangered a child. I betrayed the Circle's trust. We will stop the rite and I will stand trial.
hf1044036g9779g406dg8157g70fd59f06a44: You're damned right. Joining the Shadow Druids? What were you thinking?
h10190c07g9a6dg4909g92dbgd39fa866c3b7: I was thinking I could make us safe. A foolish notion, to think we'd find comfort in shadow.
hdc7e4189g608fg45c2g91d6ge1a03cab0bea: Power's lure is strong. I know it well.
h43985416g5284g4d24g8d00g5b493d1e3eab: It was through power that I would keep us safe. Or so I thought.
h3a505ca0g76d6g4ddbga04bg3a8643fb5144: Yet I led a child to her death, betrayed the Circle to shadow. We will stop the rite and I will stand trial.
h279d4f28g303bg4bacga52fgbcc360386e07: Yet I betrayed Silvanus himself, led the Circle to shadow. We will stop the rite and I will stand trial.
h90c4ace0gb19eg464fg819bg835929238865: Protecting the circle was natural - but you chose the wrong path.
h64731da3g7fbcg476cga700gd82735df589b: You speak more kindly than I deserve. I led a child to her death, betrayed the Circle to shadow.
ha3bc0512gc500g4249g99b9g062139413f95: We will stop the rite and I will stand trial. My fate lies with the Treefather, may he have mercy.
hca65b420g8a33g45eaga9e2gb536d187fb2d: I betrayed Silvanus himself, led the Circle to shadow.
h591d8518g6c5bg43ddgb6cdge0344de2ed40: You were ready to give up the circle to Cloakwood. It's unthinkable.
h318ca535g6f12g4594ga0e9g238b76850536: I can hardly deny it. I was so cloaked in shadow, little light could pierce through.
h51f7ff61gd66ag4845ga47fge4f05d7abfa2: How grateful I am that yours shone so brightly.
h0db1b52cg3662g4b67gab96g0741e95246af: We will stop the rite and I will stand trial. My fate lies with the Treefather, may he have mercy.
ha12fea24g7f65g4207g974cgc75160568de8: Rath thought me a danger. Seems I've proven him right.
